reviews.comment:
Realmente lamentable el trato que recibí. Dejé el auto para cargar nafta, fui a comprar caramelos y cómo demoraron en atenderme porque la chica no tenía cambio para la persona que estaba delante mío, un playero me increpó que demore, literalmente me dijo: “tenes que pensar” y casi me invita a pelear. Una vergüenza. Ellos me hicieron esperar a mi y me echaban la culpa.
No me cargaron los puntos ni me permitieron pagar con la app.
Nunca recibí un trato tan indigno en ninguna estación de servicio del país.

(Translated by Google)
The treatment I received was truly appalling. I left my car to fill up with gas, went to buy some candy, and because they took so long to serve me—the attendant didn't have change for the person in front of me—an attendant berated me for taking so long, literally telling me, "You need to think," and almost started a fight. It was shameful. They made me wait and then blamed me for it.
They wouldn't credit my points or let me pay with the app. I've never received such disgraceful treatment at any gas station in the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1NGNldEFREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
La atención un desastre..el playero se ve q estaba apurado x el camión de descarga..y m apuraba para pagar..cn esa aplicación q no arrancaba..

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster...the attendant was clearly in a hurry because of the unloading truck...and he was rushing me to pay...with that app that wouldn't start...
